description: EXAMPLE of what NOT to do — hardcoded credentials (these are fake)
warning: This file demonstrates common security mistakes for educational purposes

bad_practices.risk: Endpoint exposed if code is pushed to public repository

bad_practices.mistake: API key stored in Python file
bad_practices.risk: Bots scrape GitHub for keys within minutes of push
Credentials visible in git history even after deletion

bad_practices.mistake: Same key for dev and production
bad_practices.example: Using production keys in development environment
bad_practices.risk: Dev mistakes impact production; blast radius increases
